compressed_prompt: Write an acoustic song about the Korean peninsula no commas
response:
**"Two Rivers"**

*(Verse 1)*
Two rivers run through the land so wide
One flows north one flows south side by side
Same mountains same sky same moon so bright
But the people live in the darkest night

*(Chorus)*
Oh Korea oh Korea
Divided by a line drawn in the sand
Oh Korea oh Korea
Will you ever be one land

*(Verse 2)*
Children play in the fields of green
But the fence keeps them apart unseen
Same blood same tears same dreams they hold
But the walls are too high and the stories untold

*(Chorus)*
Oh Korea oh Korea
Divided by a line drawn in the sand
Oh Korea oh Korea
Will you ever be one land

*(Bridge)*
Maybe someday the sun will rise
Over the hills where the eagles fly
No more shadows no more pain
Just the sound of the same old rain

*(Outro)*
Two rivers run through the land so wide
One flows north one flows south side by side
Same mountains same sky same moon so bright
But the people still live in the darkest night
